commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2167fcc14807a60e46e038f192ca845444ed68bb)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Codex app-server dynamic tool bridge to keep `sessions_spawn` direct alongside `sessions_yield`, adds assertions for the thread/start payload, and updates Codex harness docs and changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main builds default searchable Codex dynamic tools with only `sessions_yield` always direct, so `sessions_spawn` is deferred under `openclaw`. I did not run a live model turn because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed for regenerated snapshots and real behavior proof; this should not be routed as a ClawSweeper repair while the proof gate is mock-only.

target.title: fix: expose Codex subagent spawn tool
target.body:
## Summary
- Keep `sessions_spawn` direct in Codex app-server dynamic tool payloads alongside `sessions_yield`, while other OpenClaw tools remain searchable under the `openclaw` namespace.
- Extend bridge and app-server attempt tests to prove `sessions_spawn` is direct in the `thread/start` payload.
- Update Codex harness docs and changelog.

## Verification
- `$NVM_DIR/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin/node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --reviewer codex --fallback-reviewer none`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Codex harness turns can see and call `sessions_spawn` directly instead of first discovering the searchable OpenClaw tool namespace.
Real environment tested: Local Codex app-server bridge tests in an isolated OpenClaw worktree.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `$NVM_DIR/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin/node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
Evidence after fix: `dynamic-tools.test.ts` and `run-attempt.test.ts` passed, including assertions that `sessions_spawn` has no `namespace` or `deferLoading` in default searchable mode.
Observed result after fix: Vitest reported 2 test files passed and 194 tests passed.
What was not tested: No live model turn was run; this PR proves the model-facing app-server dynamic tool payload contract.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
